awarding_entity: Puerto Rico Highways and Transportation Authority
project: Metropistas Toll Road Concession (PR-22 and PR-5)
claim: The Highways and Transportation Authority awarded Autopistas Metropolitanas a long-term concession agreement to operate the PR-22 and PR-5 toll roads.

project: LUMA Energy Transmission and Distribution Operation
claim: The Electric Power Authority awarded LUMA Energy an operation and maintenance agreement for the electricity transmission and distribution system.
The Electric Power Authority awarded Genera PR an operation and maintenance agreement for the legacy power-generation fleet.
